rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2016, line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION's DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION ordered OFF CALENDAR due to failure to comply with CCP 430.41.= (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE VS. DIEGO DE LEO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT DIEGO DELEO's Motion To Strike Complaint For Unlawful Detainer DENIED, complaint properly alleges a value of the use of the property that defendant is allegedly unlawfully detaining and the prayer for relief seeks a proper form of damages in and unlawful detainer action. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE VS. DIEGO DE LEO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT DIEGO DELEO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, this Court does not lack subject matter jurisdiction. Colton LLC v. Ohaeri (2015) 240 Cal.App.4th 500. Any extensions to which parties are entitled under CCP 12a are applicable by operation of law notwithstanding any assertions of the expiration of the notices. Notice re: re-occupancy and relocation assistance is sufficient. = (501/RBU)
